title: IncidentAttributes
description: The attributes of an incident record

title.description: The title of the incident describing what is affected

public_id.description: The sequential human-readable public ID of the incident within the organization

state.description: The current state of the incident in its lifecycle

severity.description: The severity level of the incident

customer_impacted.description: Whether the incident is causing direct customer impact

customer_impact_scope.description: Description of the scope of customer impact for this incident

customer_impact_start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when customer impact began

customer_impact_end.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when customer impact ended

customer_impact_duration.description: Duration of customer impact in seconds

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the incident was created

modified.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the incident was last modified

detected.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the incident was first detected

resolved.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the incident was marked as resolved

time_to_detect.description: Time in seconds from incident start to detection

time_to_internal_response.description: Time in seconds from detection to first responder acknowledgement

time_to_repair.description: Time in seconds from detection to resolution

fields.description: Custom field values for the incident as defined in organization settings

notification_handles.description: List of notification handles that were paged for this incident
